name: Double Cocolate Crumble Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter (margarine) and sugar until smooth.
2. Beat in the eggs and vanilla extract.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together the flour, chopped nuts, cocoa powder, and baking powder.
4. Stir the dry ingredients into the egg mixture until just combined.
5. Spread the batter evenly in a greased 13 by 9 by 2-inch pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 15 to 20 minutes or until set.
7. Sprinkle marshmallows evenly over the top of the bars.
8. Continue baking for an additional 3 minutes until lightly toasted.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
10. In a small saucepan, combine chocolate chips and peanut butter. Heat over low heat, stirring constantly, until smooth and melted.
11. Stir in the Rice Crispies cereal.
12. Spread the warm chocolate mixture evenly over the cooled bars.
13. Allow to set at room temperature for 15 minutes before chilling.
14. Cut into bars and refrigerate until serving.
